title: Financial Research Agent (Example)
description: Multi-agent pipeline where FinancialResearchManager orchestrates planning, web search, specialist analysis, report writing, and verification.

actors.name: Analyst (User)
actors.description: External user who submits a financial research query via CLI (main.py)

actors.name: WebSearch (Tool)
actors.description: WebSearchTool used by FinancialSearchAgent to retrieve live web data

use_cases.name: Submit Financial Research Query
use_cases.description: User enters a free-text query (e.g., 'Analyze Apple Q1'). Entry point: main.py → FinancialResearchManager.run(query)

use_cases.name: Plan Search Strategy
use_cases.description: Runner.run(planner_agent, query) → returns FinancialSearchPlan with 5–15 FinancialSearchItem entries (query + reason). Model: o3-mini.

use_cases.name: Execute Parallel Web Searches
use_cases.description: asyncio.create_task per FinancialSearchItem → Runner.run(search_agent, input_data). search_agent uses WebSearchTool; returns ≤300-word summary per query.

use_cases.name: Perform Fundamentals Analysis
use_cases.description: writer_agent calls fundamentals_tool (financials_agent.as_tool('fundamentals_analysis')). FundamentalsAnalystAgent returns AnalysisSummary.summary (revenue, margins, growth).

use_cases.name: Perform Risk Analysis
use_cases.description: writer_agent calls risk_tool (risk_agent.as_tool('risk_analysis')). RiskAnalystAgent returns AnalysisSummary.summary (competitive threats, regulatory issues, supply chain).

use_cases.name: Write Financial Report
use_cases.description: Runner.run_streamed(writer_with_tools, input_data). writer_agent synthesizes search results + specialist tool outputs → FinancialReportData {short_summary, markdown_report, follow_up_questions}.

use_cases.name: Verify Report Quality
use_cases.description: Runner.run(verifier_agent, report.markdown_report) → VerificationResult {verified: bool, issues: str}. Checks internal consistency, sourcing, unsupported claims.

use_cases.name: View Final Report & Follow-up Questions
use_cases.description: Manager prints markdown_report, follow_up_questions, and verification result to stdout. Summary also shown in printer live display.

relationships: UC1 includes UC2 (planning is mandatory before search)
UC2 includes UC3 (searches executed from plan)
UC3 includes UC6 (search results fed to writer)
UC6 extends UC4 (writer optionally calls fundamentals tool)
UC6 extends UC5 (writer optionally calls risk tool)
UC6 includes UC7 (verification always follows writing)
UC7 includes UC8 (report displayed after verification)

key_agents.name: FinancialPlannerAgent
key_agents.role: Generates structured search plan from user query

key_agents.name: FinancialWriterAgent
key_agents.role: Synthesizes search results into full markdown report

key_agents.name: FundamentalsAnalystAgent
key_agents.role: Specialist for revenue, margins, growth analysis

key_agents.name: RiskAnalystAgent
key_agents.role: Specialist for competitive, regulatory, supply chain risk

key_agents.name: VerificationAgent
key_agents.role: Audits report for consistency and sourcing

orchestration_pattern: Code-orchestrated pipeline (FinancialResearchManager) with agents-as-tools for specialist analysts. Writer agent cloned at runtime with fundamentals_tool + risk_tool attached. Parallel search via asyncio.create_task.
tracing: Full pipeline wrapped in trace('Financial research trace'). Searches wrapped in custom_span('Search the web'). Trace URL printed to user.
important_notes: PricingPacketReview and RolloutRiskReview from scope description map to FundamentalsAnalystAgent and RiskAnalystAgent respectively
SearchAgent is the component performing web research; WriterAgent is the report generator
writer_agent.clone(tools=[...]) pattern: specialist agents exposed as tools only at runtime, not statically defined on the agent
Streaming used for report writing (Runner.run_streamed); sync Runner.run used for all other agents
